Purchase Agreement
SlideInto.me
18+ This platform contains adult content intended for users aged 18 and above. By accessing paid content you legally confirm your age.
1 · SlideKeys & Payment

SlideKeys are the in-app currency of SlideInto.me. Each unlock transaction deducts the displayed SlideKey amount from your balance instantly and irrevocably upon completing the slide gesture. Prices are set by the creator and may vary per content item.

2 · No Refunds

All purchases are final and non-refundable. Once the slide gesture is completed and the content is unlocked, the transaction cannot be reversed under any circumstances. If you believe a charge was made in error, contact support within 48 hours at support@slideinto.me.

3 · Content License

Unlocking content grants you a personal, non-transferable, non-exclusive license to view that content within the SlideInto.me platform. You do not acquire any ownership rights. The content remains the intellectual property of the respective creator.

4 · Creator Independence

Content is created and sold by independent creators on the SlideInto.me platform. SlideInto.me acts as a technology provider and bears no liability if the delivered content does not match what was communicated or agreed upon with the creator. In such cases, the unique Content ID of the affected item can be included when filing a report against the creator through the platform. SlideInto.me reviews all reports and monitors creator conduct. Should a creator accumulate a significant number of substantiated complaints, consequences up to and including permanent removal from the platform will follow.

5 · Account Responsibility

You are solely responsible for all purchases made through your account. SlideInto.me is not liable for unauthorized purchases resulting from a compromised Telegram account. Enable Telegram two-factor authentication to protect your account.

6 · Privacy & Watermarking

Every piece of unlocked content is embedded with a unique content ID and a personalized watermark tied to the purchasing account's creator code. This data is stored securely and used exclusively to identify and act upon unauthorized distribution of protected content.

7 · Acceptance

By completing the slide gesture to unlock content you confirm that you are at least 18 years of age, that you have read and understood this agreement, and that you consent to the immediate, non-refundable deduction of SlideKeys from your balance.

8 · Prohibited Actions

You may not screenshot, screen-record, download, redistribute, resell, or publicly share any unlocked content. Violations result in immediate account suspension and may be subject to legal action. Each piece of content carries a unique watermark (#PMI / #PMV / #PMA) and a personalized URL watermark that identifies the purchasing account.

⚠ Legal Warning: The unauthorized distribution of purchased content outside of SlideInto.me constitutes a serious criminal offence under applicable copyright, privacy, and digital content protection laws. Offenders face civil liability and criminal prosecution, including substantial fines and imprisonment. Every piece of content on this platform is embedded with an invisible, cryptographic tracking ID that is imperceptible to the human eye but permanently bound to the file. This ID unambiguously identifies the purchasing account and enables authorities to trace the origin of any illegally distributed content with precision. SlideInto.me cooperates fully with law enforcement and will provide all relevant data upon lawful request.

© 2025 SlideInto.me · All rights reserved

Einstellungen
Benachrichtigungstypen
User Notifications
Wenn dir jemand einen Tip sendet oder folgt

Wartung, neue Features und Systemmeldungen
Post Notifications

Deaktivierte Benachrichtigungen werden nicht mehr angezeigt. Du kannst sie jederzeit wieder aktivieren.
